result.stdout:
typical usage:
repo-version [--version] [-o | --output <format>] <path>

-o, --output             The output format. Legal values are [text, json]. The default is text.
-l, --label              Overrides the current label. If not provided it will be calculated.
-v, --version            Displays the version of repo-version
path                     The path to a git repository. The default is the current directory.

manipulate config file:
repo-version <command> <path>

<command> must be one of the following
init                enitializes a repository with a repo-version.json file.
major               Bumps the version in repo-version.json to the next major version.
minor               Bumps the version in repo-version.json to the next minor version.
tag                 tags the repository with the current version
